description: Representative validation set for prompt-driven checker-spec inference. Expected templates are mechanism families visible from public prompts.

adc_dac_ideal_4b_smoke.notes: ADC-DAC round trip with ramp input, code coverage, and vout reconstruction.

sar_adc_dac_weighted_8b_smoke.notes: SAR ADC plus weighted DAC round trip.

dac_binary_clk_4b_smoke.notes: Clocked binary DAC monotonic output-span check.

dac_therm_16b_smoke.notes: Thermometer DAC levels and output span.

pfd_reset_race_smoke.notes: PFD up/dn response with non-overlap under near-simultaneous edges.

bbpd_data_edge_alignment_smoke.notes: Bang-bang data/clock lead-lag detector with bounded non-overlapping UP/DN pulses.

timer_absolute_grid_smoke.notes: Timer grid with public target rise times.

adpll_timer_smoke.notes: ADPLL feedback/reference ratio and lock behavior.

inverted_comparator_logic_bug.notes: Comparator polarity bug; prompt-visible mechanism is threshold decision polarity.

strongarm_reset_priority_bug.notes: StrongArm comparator decision with reset-priority behavior.

swapped_pfd_outputs_bug.notes: PFD up/dn outputs swapped relative to ref/div lead direction.

cmp_delay_smoke.notes: Clocked comparator threshold decision with delay trend.

comparator_hysteresis_smoke.notes: Comparator hysteresis with rising/falling decision thresholds.

cppll_freq_step_reacquire_smoke.notes: CPPLL frequency step, unlock, and reacquire behavior.

digital_basics_smoke.notes: Basic logic gate and DFF smoke behavior.

gray_counter_one_bit_change_smoke.notes: Gray-code counter with one-bit adjacent transitions.

pfd_deadzone_smoke.notes: PFD deadzone pulse response with non-overlap.

dwa_ptr_gen_no_overlap_smoke.notes: DWA rotating pointer/cell-enable window with no-overlap behavior.

dwa_wraparound_smoke.notes: DWA rotating pointer/cell-enable window with wraparound behavior.

serializer_8b_smoke.notes: Serializer bit sequence and output alignment.

xor_pd_smoke.notes: XOR phase detector logic relation between ref/div and pd_out.

pipeline_stage.notes: Pipeline ADC stage sampled decision/residue behavior.

sar_12bit.notes: SAR logic sequencing with EOC and CDAC control outputs.

sar_logic.notes: SAR logic sequencing with ready flag and DAC control outputs.

clk_divider.notes: Programmable clock divider cadence and lock behavior.

adpll_timer.notes: Spec-to-VA ADPLL reference/feedback tracking and lock behavior.

multitone.notes: Multitone source requires bound-step guidance for high-frequency components.

clk_div_min_tb.notes: TB generation for clock divider cadence observability.

comparator_offset_tb.notes: TB generation for comparator offset sweep/crossing.

dac_ramp_tb.notes: TB generation for DAC monotonic ramp response.

dco_gain_step_tb.notes: TB generation for DCO control-to-frequency step response.

sample_hold_aperture_tb.notes: TB generation for sample-hold aperture/capture behavior.

sample_hold_step_tb.notes: TB generation for sample-hold step behavior.

segmented_dac_glitch_tb.notes: TB generation for segmented DAC code scan and glitch/monotonicity inspection.
